description_long: This is a military-style utility helicopter with a streamlined, aerodynamic fuselage painted in matte olive drab. It features a large main rotor with four long, wide blades and a smaller tail rotor mounted on the left side of the tail boom. The cockpit is located at the front, with multiple angular windows providing visibility for the pilots. The helicopter is equipped with robust landing gear, including two main wheels and a tail wheel, rather than traditional skids. The body is constructed primarily from metal, likely aluminum alloy, with reinforced areas and visible panel lines. The overall design suggests durability and functionality for urban or tactical operations.
description: A matte olive drab military-style helicopter with a four-blade main rotor, angular cockpit windows, and wheeled landing gear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the four-blade main rotor, streamlined fuselage, and tail rotor alignment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cockpit windows, side doors, and the main and tail wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the angular cockpit windows, nose profile, and the symmetry of the main rotor.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the fuselage, rotor, and landing gear details.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, wide, straight-edged main rotor blades made of composite or metal, colored black with no visible markings. The blades are evenly spaced and extend well beyond the fuselage.
attribute_tail_rotor: A small tail rotor with four short blades, mounted vertically on the left side of the tail boom. The blades are black and appear to be made of composite or metal, with no visible markings.
attribute_landing_skids: This helicopter uses wheeled landing gear instead of skids, featuring two main wheels under the fuselage and a smaller tail wheel, all with visible struts and supports.
attribute_cockpit_windows: The cockpit has multiple angular windows, including two large front-facing panes and several side windows, all framed in metal and slightly tinted.
